prioritised_actions: Fix the Kconfig warning by checking the SEC_CERT_DAC_PROVIDER definition
Remove unused variables and functions to improve code quality
Fix the include file not found error by checking the mock_idf.h file
Rebuild and rerun the unit tests to ensure they pass

summary: The build was successful, but there are several warnings and quality gate errors that need to be addressed. The unit tests failed due to a build error. The code quality is degraded and needs improvement. It is recommended to fix the Kconfig warning, remove unused variables and functions, and address the quality gate errors to improve the overall health of the project.
